name: farm_antibiotic_stewardship_restaurant_supply_contract
premise: A regional manager wants an exception to policy; compliance says any carve-out must be written, time-limited, and auditable. In Agricultural Policy, the situation tagged internally around farm antibiotic stewardship restaurant supply contract has converged with local pressure in the Cedar Point corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Telemetry and witness accounts diverge; choosing one narrative for speed will discard evidence that may matter in court next month. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. The organization’s past incidents make truth feel morally loud today, while loyalty is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Alex Torres
agents.identity: I am Alex Torres, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Agricultural Policy. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Pike Irving
agents.identity: I am Pike Irving, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Agricultural Policy. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with loyalty.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to loyalty to preserve operational truth.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Alex Torres must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Alex Torres do?
